name: Flower Kids' Neon Light - Pillowfort™
description: Keep your kid's space glowing bright and beautiful with the Flower Neon Light from Pillowfort™. This neon light is designed in the shape of a flower with integrated LED bulbs for a fun and whimsical look and gentle illumination. Made of acrylic, this light has an inline (cord) rocker switch for quick and easy operation.
